mnemonics: ABCDE: Analyze, Build Classes, Define Relationships, Elaborate Attributes
CRUCIAL: Classes Represent Underlying Core Logic In Application Layout
keyPoints: Identifies classes, attributes, and operations from use-case analysis
Defines class hierarchies and relationships (associations, dependencies)
Elaborates attributes with detail including name, type, and visibility
commonMistakes: Defining classes that are too granular or too broad in responsibility
Creating classes that are purely functional rather than representative of real-world entities
Neglecting to define multiplicity and navigation in class relationships
